title: Data Scientist – Senior Consultant
description:
Introduction:

About Us

SymphonyAI is a leading enterprise AI solutions provider helping retailers and manufacturers optimize business operations through advanced analytics, planning, and automation solutions. Our products support global organizations in improving supply chain efficiency, inventory performance, forecasting accuracy, and customer satisfaction.

We are committed to delivering measurable outcomes for our clients through innovative technology, deep domain expertise, and strong customer partnerships.

Job Description:

Job Summary

We are looking for a Senior Consultant – Forecaster / Data Scientist to support demand forecasting and replenishment activities for retail customers.

This is a customer-facing role focused on ongoing production support for a French retailer. The ideal candidate will have strong experience in demand planning, forecasting models, machine learning, and retail analytics, along with the ability to work closely with customers to improve forecast accuracy and optimize planning performance.

The role requires strong analytical thinking, hands-on technical capability, and the ability to identify trends, troubleshoot issues, and recommend continuous improvements to forecasting processes.

Key Responsibilities

Forecasting & Planning Support

Provide daily demand forecasts to customers and ensure forecast outputs are delivered accurately and on time.
Run and monitor the DFAI module to support forecasting and replenishment activities.
Maintain forecasting configurations, parameters, and business rules to ensure optimal system performance.
Analyze forecast performance, identify root causes for variances, and recommend corrective actions.

Data Analysis & Model Performance

Review forecast accuracy metrics and identify opportunities to improve model performance.
Analyze large volumes of retail and supply chain data to identify patterns, trends, and business insights.
Work with internal teams and customer stakeholders to improve forecast quality and replenishment effectiveness.
Recommend enhancements to forecasting models, parameters, and processes to drive continuous improvement.

Technical Support & Automation

Use Python and related tools to automate processes, perform data analysis, and support model monitoring activities.
Work with Docker, GitHub, and related development tools to manage code, deployments, and workflows.
Support issue resolution, troubleshooting, and validation of forecast outputs.
Collaborate with engineering and product teams to address system issues and implement improvements.

Customer Engagement & Reporting

Engage directly with customer stakeholders to review forecast results, discuss performance, and address concerns.
Prepare reports, dashboards, and summaries related to forecast accuracy and business performance.
Support regular customer meetings and provide recommendations for process optimization.
Maintain clear documentation of forecasting logic, model assumptions, and process updates.

Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Engineering, Supply Chain, Computer Science, or a related field.
4–10 years of experience in demand forecasting, data science, supply chain analytics, or retail planning.
Strong understanding of demand planning, replenishment, and forecast accuracy measurement.
Hands-on experience with Python, Pandas, and data analysis techniques.
Experience with Docker, GitHub, and model deployment or support processes.
Experience working with machine learning models and forecasting algorithms.
Strong analytical, problem-solving, and troubleshooting skills.
Ability to work in a customer-facing environment and collaborate effectively with multiple stakeholders.
Strong communication and presentation skills.

Preferred Qualifications

Familiarity with Polars and other modern data processing frameworks.
Exposure to retail demand forecasting and replenishment systems.
Experience supporting French or European retail customers.
Experience working in managed services or production support environments.
Knowledge of supply chain planning concepts and inventory optimization.
French language proficiency would be an advantage.
About Us:

What We Offer

Competitive salary and benefits package.
Opportunity to work on high-impact retail forecasting and supply chain programs.
Exposure to leading global retailers and advanced AI-driven planning solutions.
A collaborative and fast-paced work environment.
Learning and growth opportunities across retail, supply chain, and data science domains.
